title: Ruby Red Hanging Paper Tissue Pompom (40cm) 1 Piece - Vibrant Solid Color Party Decoration for Birthdays, Weddings, Baby Showers, and Events
features: VIBRANT RUBY RED DESIGN: Add a pop of color to your party with our 40cm ruby red hanging paper tissue pompom, perfect for brightening up any celebration, be it birthdays, weddings, baby showers or other events.
EASY-TO-ASSEMBLE DECORATION: Have your stylish party decorations up in no time with our simple hanging mechanism, allowing you to focus on the fun and festivities without stress.
QUALITY & QUANTITY: Made from premium paper tissue material, this 1-piece pompom ensures a durable and long-lasting decoration that can handle all your festivities.

PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Elevate your events with our eye-catching solid color party decoration ranging from intimate gatherings to large-scale celebrations like birthdays, baby showers, weddings, and more.

MAXIMIZE YOUR PARTY DECOR IMPACT: Mix and match with our other party decorations to create a stunning display that will leave your guests in awe. Achieve that perfectly coordinated look for a memorable and visually impressive event.
description: Product Description Make your party more elegant with our disposable Ruby Red Tissue Pom Pom. 1 Hanging Tissue Pom Pom - 16". This hanging decoration features ruby red colored tissues that forms a fluffy and elegant pom pom. This lovely decoration is great for birthdays, weddings, or any special events. Our high quality paper pom poms add a beautiful atmosphere to any indoor room or outdoor party event. Made with environment friendly tissue paper that is disposable and biodegradable. Box Contains 1 x Tissue Paper Pom Pom
